title: Advanced Architectures Path
description: Build fluency in Advanced Architectures inside Graph Analysis by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Core ML
steps.summary: Core ML belongs to the Graph Analysis area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Graph Analysis / Advanced Architectures. Start after ML Systems. It opens into Core ML Tools.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: SwinIR-Seg
steps.summary: SwinIR-Seg belongs to the Graph Analysis area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Graph Analysis / Advanced Architectures. Start after SwinIR.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Seldon MLServer
steps.summary: Seldon MLServer belongs to the Graph Analysis area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Graph Analysis / Advanced Architectures. Start after MLServer.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Persistent Homology
steps.summary: Persistent Homology belongs to the Graph Analysis area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Graph Analysis / Advanced Architectures. Compare it with SwinIR-Seg and Soda Core. It opens into Persistent Homology Graph Features.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Soda Core
steps.summary: Soda Core belongs to the Graph Analysis area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Graph Analysis / Advanced Architectures. Compare it with Seldon Core and Reka Core.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Reka Core
steps.summary: Reka Core belongs to the Graph Analysis area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Graph Analysis / Advanced Architectures. Compare it with Soda Core and Seldon Core.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Seldon Core
steps.summary: Seldon Core belongs to the Graph Analysis area of AI/ML, within Advanced Architectures. It sits inside Graph Analysis / Advanced Architectures. Compare it with Soda Core and Seldon MLServer.
